reviews.review_description: Love the game. I could spend slot of time here.

reviews.review_title: I Want To Be A Hero!
reviews.review_description:
PLEASE, developer... have the asteroids "attack" the planet, and let us save the world!
That would be SO much more fun... like ten times more fun.

Your current masterpiece is beautiful and fun, and that's just breaking rocks for weight!

Let us be galactic protectors. Have the citizens of a Planet call us for help because their planet is heading into an asteroid field. Then we "beam" over there and protect them by shooting down the asteroids and breaking them into pieces small enough to burn up in their atmosphere. Having animations of the small pieces burning up would be awesome.
Hearing radio chatter from the planet as we progress would be good too.
Have them say "great shot" or "we can't take much more".. if too many large pieces are getting through. And that's how the game should be scored, by how many you can destroy before too many  get through.
Ideally, you could restart that level instantly if too many large asteroid pieces get through, and try again until saving that planet, ...and then get another distress call.. and do it again, planet after planet, each different and beautiful.  I want to save the galaxy from asteroids! And be a hero! ...Not that miners have no worth...

What I am saying is that you are about 90% of the way to a HUGE selling game.. give us motivation to play... shooting rocks for tonnage is fine, but it can't compare to saving the Galaxy! Right?

I will give you 5 stars and lots of money if you make it awesome...
